Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Vacate Order Re Dismissals
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order re: Dismissal issued on 11/15/2005 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for a Dismissal Order to Show Cause re: CRC 225 on 2/6/2007 at 10:00 am, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
